text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has unfortunately hurt herself, so I
help wrap up her injury.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for worrying you, but I'm fine! It might as
well be a scratch!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: In fact, I can run on it just fine.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But of course. It feels a little off, but it hardly
even hurts.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list: Let's take a break to be safe!
Fine, but we're only doing light exercises.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list: I forbid you from overworking yourself.
I forbid you from overworking yourself.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Er, I suppose I'll have to rest if you're going to go
that far...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Besides, I'd hate to stress you out.

Fuji Kiseki rests as instructed, but she looks
frustrated as she gazes outside...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Gotcha. I don't want to make it any worse either.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Let's just start with a light warm-up—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: My body really doesn't it like it when I move like that!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but maybe we shouldn't continue training
today...

Fuji Kiseki takes it easy in order not to worsen her
injury.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Everything's good, and I barely feel any pain.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I should be able to finish up the rest of the
exercises for today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Your first aid was top-notch. Hehe. I'd expect
nothing less from my trainer.

Fuji Kiseki's condition doesn't hold her back and
she completes training with no issues at all!
